message:
feat: add Flintlock client wrapper

Adds a wrapper around the Flintlock gRPC client for managing microVMs.
Includes VMConfig validation, VM status conversion, and all CRUD operations.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5,18 +5,21 @@ go 1.24.0

+	github.com/google/uuid v1.6.0
+	github.com/liquidmetal-dev/flintlock/api v0.0.0-20251202154859-49e881a25c36
 	github.com/mattn/go-sqlite3 v1.14.33
 	github.com/spf13/cobra v1.10.2
-	google.golang.org/grpc v1.64.1
+	google.golang.org/grpc v1.68.0
 	google.golang.org/protobuf v1.36.11
 )

+	github.com/grpc-ecosystem/grpc-gateway/v2 v2.24.0 // indirect
 	github.com/inconshreveable/mousetrap v1.1.0 // indirect
-	github.com/liquidmetal-dev/flintlock/api v0.0.0-20251202154859-49e881a25c36 // indirect

+	google.golang.org/genproto/googleapis/rpc v0.0.0-20241118233622-e639e219e697 // indirect
 )
